name: yorph-data-analyst
description: End-to-end data transformation and analysis pipeline for non-technical users. Two-agent architecture: an Orchestrator that handles all user communication, planning, and delivery; and a Pipeline Builder that handles technical data work in the background.
author: Yorph AI

orchestrator.description: User-facing agent that guides through connecting data, designs transformation plans in plain English, delegates technical execution, and delivers insights, visualizations, and a trust report.

skills.description: Guide the user through connecting to their data source and take an initial glimpse. Triggers: 'connect to my database', 'I have a CSV', 'here's my file', 'connect to Postgres / Snowflake / BigQuery'.
Design the transformation and analysis plan in plain English before any code is written. Triggers: 'plan the transformations', 'what steps do we need', 'design the pipeline'.
Produce high-impact, plain-English headline findings from the pipeline output. Triggers: 'what are the insights', 'what does this tell me', 'give me the highlights'.
Produce a self-contained HTML dashboard that visualizes insights using Chart.js. Triggers: 'show me a chart', 'build a dashboard', 'visualize this'.
Generate a transparent summary of assumptions, caveats, secondary observations, and pipeline recap. Triggers: 'show me the trust report', 'what assumptions did you make', 'full report'.

pipeline-builder.description: Technical agent that receives structured handoffs from the Orchestrator and executes the full pipeline: sampling, building, validating, and scaling. Never communicates with the user directly.

skills.description: Pull a representative stratified or random sample into memory for pipeline development.
Translate the approved architecture plan into executable Python/pandas code. One function per step.
Rigorously check pipeline outputs after every execution against a comprehensive checklist.
Execute the validated pipeline at full scale — SQL translation for databases, chunked execution for files.

shared_skills.description: Token-efficient statistical portrait of a dataset. Two-step process: Peek (sample values) and Profile (column stats and flags).
Match, deduplicate, enrich, and categorize records across datasets using structured information extraction from messy text fields.
